object_a.label: lamp
object_a.description: Table lamp on left nightstand with fabric shade
object_a.long_form_open_description: Traditional style lamp with a turned base and beige fabric shade producing warm light that casts a soft glow on the headboard and wall. Positioned on the left nightstand close to the headboard.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on the left nightstand immediately adjacent to the headboard.

object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Traditional style lamp with a turned base and beige fabric shade producing warm light that casts a soft glow on the headboard and wall. Positioned on the left nightstand close to the headboard.

object_b.label: lamp
object_b.description: table lamp with beige fabric shade on top of nightstand, currently lit
object_b.long_form_open_description: Traditional-style table lamp with a turned wood or bronze base and a beige/tan tapered fabric shade. The lamp is switched on, casting warm light upward onto the wall and downward onto the nightstand surface.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on the nightstand, slightly toward the back center of the top surface, casting light onto the wall behind
